data.name: App_PasteConflict_AlreadyExists2
data.value: already exists in the destination folder.

data.name: App_PasteConflict_Instructions
data.value: Enter a new name to rename the pasted file, or choose an action below.

data.name: App_RemoveFromProjectMessage
data.value: Remove '{0}' from the project?\n(The file on disk will not be deleted.)

data.name: App_DeleteFileMessage
data.value: Delete '{0}' and send it to the Recycle Bin?{1}{1}This will also remove it from the project.

data.name: App_RemoveFolderMessage
data.value: Remove folder '{0}' from the project?{1}Items inside will be kept at the project root. The physical directory will not be deleted.

data.name: App_RemoveSolutionFolderMessage
data.value: Remove solution folder '{0}'?{1}Projects inside will be kept at the solution root.

data.name: App_ImportIntoProjectMessage
data.value: Copy "{0}" into the project directory?{1}{2}{1}The original file will not be deleted.

data.name: App_CompareWithHeadNoRepo
data.value: No git repository found for this file.

data.name: App_CompareWithHeadNoVersion
data.value: Could not extract HEAD version from git.

data.name: App_UpgradeMessagePattern
data.value: The following files use an older format (v{0}) that will be upgraded to v{1}:{2}{2} • {3}{2}{2}A backup (.v{0}.bak) will be created for each file.{2}{2}Upgrade now?

data.name: App_Toolbar_PluginUpdates
data.value: Plugin updates available — click to open Marketplace

data.name: App_Debug_AttachPidPrompt
data.value: Enter the process ID (PID) to attach to:

data.name: App_Debug_NoStartupProject
data.value: No startup project is set. Please set a startup project before debugging.

data.name: App_Debug_BuildFailed
data.value: Build failed. Fix the errors before debugging.

data.name: App_Debug_ExeNotFound
data.value: Cannot find the program to debug:{0}{1}{0}{0}The project was built but the output executable was not found.

data.name: App_Convert_NotSln
data.value: The current solution is not a .sln file.

data.name: App_Convert_NotSlnx
data.value: The current solution is not a .slnx file.

data.name: App_Convert_AlreadyWhsln
data.value: The current solution is already a .whsln file.

data.name: App_Convert_Confirm
data.value: Convert "{0}" → "{1}"?{2}{2}The original file will be preserved.

data.name: App_Convert_NoLoader
data.value: No loader registered for {0} format. Make sure the VS Solution Loader plugin is active.

data.name: App_Convert_Success
data.value: Converted to "{0}".{1}{1}Open the converted solution now?

data.name: App_LSP_TryOpenFile
data.value: Try opening the declaring file directly, or ensure the LSP server is running.

data.name: App_LSP_LoadAssembly
data.value: Load the assembly in Assembly Explorer to navigate to its decompiled source.

data.name: App_Debugger_AdapterNotFound
data.value: Debug adapter (netcoredbg) not found.{0}Install it or set the path in Options → Debugger.

data.name: App_Debugger_AdapterMissing
data.value: Install the appropriate adapter plugin or configure a custom adapter.

data.name: App_Options_HighlightCharDiff
data.value: Highlight character-level differences within modified lines (≤ 500 chars)

data.name: App_Options_ShowReturnValues
data.value: Show return values in Locals after each step

data.name: App_Options_HighlightBreakpoints
data.value: Highlight breakpoint lines in editor (red/orange/gray tint)

data.name: App_Options_AutoImportBreakpoints
data.value: Auto-import VS breakpoints on first solution open

data.name: App_Options_AutoExportBreakpoints
data.value: Auto-export breakpoints to VS XML on save

data.name: App_Options_DetectExternalChanges
data.value: Detect when files are changed outside the IDE

data.name: App_Options_ScrollTabRows
data.value: Scroll tab rows with mouse wheel

data.name: App_Options_PromptSaveWorkspace
data.value: Prompt to save workspace before closing

data.name: APP_VM_TipFormatBrowser
data.value: Browse and manage built-in and user .whfmt format definitions

data.name: APP_VM_TipFormatCatalog
data.value: Open the Format Catalog document tab (all formats in a sortable grid)

data.name: APP_VM_TipEntropy
data.value: Analyse entropy and byte distribution of the active file

data.name: Debugger_RemoteConnectFailed
data.value: Failed to connect to remote debug adapter.

data.name: Debugger_HotReloadNotSupported
data.value: Hot Reload is not supported by this runtime.

data.name: CodeAnalysis_StatusBar_Tooltip
data.value: Code Quality Score — click to open report

data.name: CodeAnalysis_Error_NoSolution
data.value: No solution open. Open a solution before running Code Analysis.

data.name: CodeAnalysis_Options_AutoOnOpen
data.value: Run analysis automatically on solution open

data.name: CodeAnalysis_Options_ShowBadge
data.value: Show score badge in status bar

data.name: CodeAnalysis_Tooltip_Rerun_SameScope
data.value: Re-run analysis using the same scope and path as the last run

data.name: CodeAnalysis_Tooltip_Rerun_RunSolution
data.value: Run analysis on the full solution

data.name: CodeAnalysis_Tooltip_Rerun
data.value: Re-run the full Code Analysis on the current solution. Shortcut: F5

data.name: CodeAnalysis_Tooltip_Export
data.value: Export the report — Markdown (human-readable), CSV (spreadsheet), SARIF (CI/PR annotations), or PR Checklist (auto-generated review template).

data.name: CodeAnalysis_Tooltip_QualityScore_Body
data.value: Weighted aggregate of six sub-scores: Volume 10%, Complexity 25%, Coupling 20%, Duplication 20%, Dead Code 15%, Conventions 10%.

data.name: CodeAnalysis_Tooltip_QualityScore_Trending
data.value: Trending arrow shows the delta vs the previous saved snapshot.

data.name: CodeAnalysis_Tooltip_Score
data.value: Overall score 0-100. Hover the SCORE section for the formula.

data.name: CodeAnalysis_Tooltip_Grade
data.value: Letter grade derived from the score (A+, A, A-, B+, B, B-, C+, C, C-, D, F).

data.name: CodeAnalysis_Tooltip_Trending
data.value: Difference vs the previous snapshot: ▲ improvement, ▼ regression.

data.name: CodeAnalysis_Tooltip_Radar
data.value: Six axes 0-100 (further from centre = better): Vol = file-size compliance · CC = complexity headroom · Coup = coupling stability · Dup = duplication ratio · Dead = unused-symbol ratio · Conv = naming/convention compliance.

data.name: CodeAnalysis_Tooltip_Tab_Overview
data.value: High-level summary: per-project breakdown + 5 worst-scoring files. Double-click a row to drill in.

data.name: CodeAnalysis_Tooltip_Tab_Issues
data.value: All diagnostics produced this run: WH00xx quality rules + CS/IDE Roslyn warnings. Filter by severity / search / group; double-click to jump to the source line.

data.name: CodeAnalysis_Tooltip_Tab_Complexity
data.value: Top methods by Cyclomatic + Cognitive complexity. McCabe (CC) counts decision points; Cognitive (Sonar-style) weights nesting. Higher = harder to test/maintain.

data.name: CodeAnalysis_Tooltip_Tab_Coupling
data.value: Per-type Ca (afferent — depends on you), Ce (efferent — you depend on), and Instability = Ce/(Ca+Ce). Instability close to 1 = volatile module; close to 0 = stable foundation.

data.name: CodeAnalysis_Tooltip_Tab_Duplication
data.value: Token-based clone detection. Each group is a sequence of ≥50 tokens (configurable) found in 2+ places — candidates for extraction into a shared helper.

data.name: CodeAnalysis_Tooltip_Tab_Treemap_Body
data.value: Each rectangle is one source file. Area is proportional to lines of code; colour is the per-file quality score (green = healthy, red = poor). Hover for full metrics, click to open.

data.name: CodeAnalysis_Tooltip_Tab_DeadCode
data.value: Private/internal symbols Roslyn could not find any reference to. Verify each — false positives can occur for symbols used via reflection, DI containers, or source generators.

data.name: CodeAnalysis_Treemap_Banner_Body
data.value: rectangle area = lines of code, colour = quality score. Hover for full metrics, click a tile to open the file.
